  • Package grafiosch.exceptions

    • Exception Class grafiosch.exceptions.DataViolationException

      class DataViolationException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • dataViolation
          List<DataViolation> dataViolation
          List of accumulated data validation violations.

          Contains all validation violations that have been collected during the validation process. Each violation includes field information, message keys, and parameters needed for generating localized error messages to display to users.

        • localeStr
          String localeStr
          Locale string for internationalized error message generation.

          Stores the user's locale preference for proper localization of error messages. When present, error handlers can use this locale to generate appropriate translated messages. When null, the system default locale or current request locale is typically used.

    • Exception Class grafiosch.exceptions.GeneralNotTranslatedWithArgumentsException

      class GeneralNotTranslatedWithArgumentsException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • arguments
          Object[] arguments
          Array of arguments for message template parameter substitution.

          Contains the values that will be substituted into the message template placeholders during deferred message translation. The arguments are preserved in their original form to ensure proper formatting when the message is eventually resolved with the correct locale.

        • messageKey
          String messageKey
          The message key for internationalized error message lookup.

          References a key in the application's message resource bundles that contains the localized error message template. This key will be used later by exception handlers to resolve the appropriate translated message based on the user's locale.

    • Exception Class grafiosch.exceptions.LimitEntityTransactionException

      class LimitEntityTransactionException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • limitEntityTransactionError
          LimitEntityTransactionError limitEntityTransactionError

          Flag indicating whether transaction rollback should be performed.

      serialVersionUID:
      1L

          The start date of the hold period.
        • idSecuritycashAccount

    • Class grafioschtrader.entities.HoldCashaccountDeposit.HoldCashaccountDepositKey

      class HoldCashaccountDepositKey extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • fromHoldDate
          LocalDate fromHoldDate
        • idSecuritycashAccount
          Integer idSecuritycashAccount

    • Class grafioschtrader.entities.HoldSecurityaccountSecurityKey

      class HoldSecurityaccountSecurityKey extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • fromHoldDate
          LocalDate fromHoldDate
          Start date of this holding period.

          This date marks when this particular holding period began, typically corresponding to a transaction date that changed the position size. The date enables temporal querying and ensures unique identification of holding periods over time.

          Important: This is the start date only. The end date is stored separately in the main entity to maintain proper temporal relationships between consecutive holding periods.

        • idSecuritycashAccount
          Integer idSecuritycashAccount
          Identifier of the security account where the security is held.

          This references the specific account within a portfolio where the security position exists. Multiple security accounts can exist within a single portfolio, each potentially holding different securities or the same security with different strategies.

        • idSecuritycurrency
          Integer idSecuritycurrency
          Identifier of the security being held.

          This references the specific financial instrument (stock, bond, etc.) that is being tracked in this holding record. The same security can be held across multiple accounts and time periods.

    • Class grafioschtrader.entities.ImportTransactionPlatform

      class ImportTransactionPlatform extends Auditable implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

        • idCsvImportImplementation

        • idTransactionImportPlatform

        • name

  • Package grafioschtrader.search

    • Class grafioschtrader.search.CurrencyPairSearchBuilder

      class CurrencyPairSearchBuilder extends SecuritycurrencySearchBuilder implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

    • Class grafioschtrader.search.SecuritycurrencySearch

      class SecuritycurrencySearch extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • activeDate
          LocalDate activeDate
        • assetclassType
          AssetclassType assetclassType
        • currency
          String currency
        • excludeDerivedSecurity
          boolean excludeDerivedSecurity
        • idConnectorHistory
          String idConnectorHistory
        • idConnectorIntra
          String idConnectorIntra
        • idStockexchange
          Integer idStockexchange
        • isin
          String isin
        • leverageFactor
          Float leverageFactor
        • maxFromDate
          LocalDate maxFromDate
          A correlation matrix must have historical price data for a specific time period. This date defines the start date.
        • minToDate
          LocalDate minToDate
          A correlation matrix must have historical price data for a specific time period. This date defines the end date.
        • name
          String name
        • noMarketValue
          boolean noMarketValue
          A correlation matrix can only work with data from historical price data, so this flag is set to true.
        • onlyTenantPrivate
          Boolean onlyTenantPrivate
        • specialInvestmentInstruments
          SpecialInvestmentInstruments specialInvestmentInstruments
        • stockexchangeCountryCode
          String stockexchangeCountryCode
        • subCategoryNLS
          String subCategoryNLS
        • tickerSymbol
          String tickerSymbol
        • withHoldings
          boolean withHoldings

    • Class grafioschtrader.search.SecuritySearchBuilder

      class SecuritySearchBuilder extends SecuritycurrencySearchBuilder implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • idSecurityList
          List<Integer> idSecurityList
          Specific list of security IDs to include in results (optional)
        • idTenant
          Integer idTenant
          Tenant ID for privacy security filtering and access control
